title: Turn 10,994 Notes Into Memory - Paul Iusztin, Decoding AI & Louis-François Bouchard, Towards AI
summary: Paul Iusztin and Louis-Francois Bouchard demonstrate methods to convert notes, documents, videos, and repositories into memory structures for AI agents. The session covers techniques for transforming unstructured information into usable agent memory.
